title: Updating Rebuild or Alienating the Fans
display_title: Updating Rebuild or Alienating the Fans
wikitext:
[]: Updating Rebuild or Alienating the Fans?             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Sun May 20, 2007 1:35 pm I'm really supportive of Rebuild, first off. I know there will be tons of changes, I look forward to the new twists and turns it may take. Most of them, I don't really expect to bother me, but I still can't help but wonder if there will be something that will totally turn me off to the idea of the whole thing and cry "sell out!" I'm sure they'll change the time so that it will no longer have taken place in the year 2000, even if they leave it the same, I'm okay with that. Something like that though, I consider to be trivial. Too many trivial updates could be detrimental, I suppose. Changing Misato's car would bother me, but not really turn me off to Rebuild. However, changing Misato's car, giving Unit-00 a new paint job, making Kaji clean shaven, and giving Keel bionic legs would make me go sour-milk face. I suppose, in a nutshell, what inclusion, exclusion, modification, or update, major or minor, would it take to turn you away from Rebuild?

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sun May 20, 2007 1:59 pm Nothing. The more changes there are, the better it is. I don't want rebuild to be just a slight remix of Evangelion, I want it to be VERY different from the original show. Would it be really interesting if we hope that they keep as much things as possible similar to the first serie? I don't think so...

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun May 20, 2007 2:04 pm Wouldn't it be really interesting if everyone would stop bitching about things that may or may not happen?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun May 20, 2007 2:14 pm Updating the background tech base from 1994 to 2007 wouldn't hurt.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sun May 20, 2007 2:22 pm Oh, and I'd want people's clothes to be updated too. I realized that in Evangelion people always wear the same clothes over and again. Some change would be nice. Also... I'm kinda afraid about the end. I wonder what they will do...

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun May 20, 2007 2:31 pm For me, the only thing that would make me crank up the hate on Webuiwd would be if the storyline goes to far away from Shinseiki to the point that it sucks.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun May 20, 2007 2:35 pm I hope that the ending is completely different. No harpies or instrumentality, but something else, something completely new. Otherwise, why not just watch the series?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun May 20, 2007 2:36 pm I have said it for a long time now. I fear anno pulling a george lucas and ruining a good show. Not that I would not mind more eva im jsut afraid

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun May 20, 2007 2:53 pm Jinroh wrote: Oh, and I'd want people's clothes to be updated too. I realized that in Evangelion people always wear the same clothes over and again. Some change would be nice. Also... I'm kinda afraid about the end. I wonder what they will do...

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sun May 20, 2007 4:26 pm BrikHaus wrote: I hope that the ending is completely different. No harpies or instrumentality, but something else, something completely new. Otherwise, why not just watch the series?

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Sun May 20, 2007 4:38 pm Changing the SDAT to an iPod is a good call. I want a ton of changes, I want a different ending. I want a lot of forward steps by the team. You guys also horrify me sometimes too. Since the George Lucas remark, now all I can think about is the Eva equivalent of Jar-Jar. We all want change though, we all want updates and cool stuff and wow effects, the things I'm talking about could be anywhere from seemingly insignificant (Fuyutski standing on the opposite side of Gendo) to boarderline unacceptable (Shinji and Asuka's mothers being alive). So far the only thing that I've heard that really bothers me is the female Kaworu thing. No thanks! The last thing I need is for Kaworu to end up as a really cute anime girl and make my girlfriend question my sexuality even more.

[]:             Quote Post by Lord Glavin » Sun May 20, 2007 4:39 pm Personally I hope they change it to what they origianlly were going to do. Since this time budget retraint and TV censorship wont be too much of a concern. If done right, it could be better than original, but not have so much of an impact as the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sun May 20, 2007 4:42 pm fadingreminder wrote: We all want change though, we all want updates and cool stuff and wow effects, the things I'm talking about could be anywhere from seemingly insignificant (Fuyutski standing on the opposite side of Gendo) to boarderline unacceptable (Shinji and Asuka's mothers being alive). So far the only thing that I've heard that really bothers me is the female Kaworu thing. No thanks! The last thing I need is for Kaworu to end up as a really cute anime girl and make my girlfriend question my sexuality even more.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun May 20, 2007 4:45 pm Executor wrote: We aready got annoying as hell characters anyways, there is no way in hell we REALLY need more.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun May 20, 2007 4:47 pm cat42 wrote: Exactly, they should make the story better and get rid of Shinji. (Or have him disapear into a sea of Dirac for good)

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sun May 20, 2007 4:48 pm Mr. Tines wrote: cat42 wrote: Exactly, they should make the story better and get rid of Shinji. (Or have him disapear into a sea of Dirac for good)

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun May 20, 2007 4:52 pm But if Shinji's gone, who will there be for Kaworu to love? :( Actually, truth be told, while I utterly despised Asuka the first time I saw the series, I felt a great deal of sympathy for her the 3rd time, and sort of liked her character by the 5th viewing. 22' is my absolute favorite ep actually. I just hope they keep her and Shinji's relationship as fucked up in Webuild, and that Kaji hurts her more, though unintentionally...

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sun May 20, 2007 4:53 pm cat42 wrote: But if Shinji's gone, who will there be for Kaworu to love? :(

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun May 20, 2007 4:54 pm cat42 wrote: But if Shinji's gone, who will there be for Kaworu to love?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun May 20, 2007 4:54 pm I like the idea that the fake trailer used and keep it 2015, but have it a "different" 2015. They said 2015 d.c., though I'm not sure what that means. Mahoromatic's manga ending mentioned the ending of BC and starting of the Space Age; something like that would not be too Farfetch'd and would allow it to be a neon genesis while not making people think "Second Impact in 2000? That never happened..."
